titleStmt.title: SII 16.39: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 39. (A.R. No. 386 of 1904.) PRODDAṬŪR, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the Rāmēśvara temple.
The inscription is dated Śaka 1420, Kāḷayukti, Mārgiśira ba. 30, Thursday, solar eclipse, regularly corresponding to 1490 A.D., December 13, °18.

Records a gift of 4(1/2) puṭṭis of dry land equivalent in extent to one gōcharmam to the sthānam vāru for god Rāmaliṅga of Rāmēśvaram in Muliki-nāḍu by Gaṇṭi Kannamanāyuḍu, with the stipulation that the land be converted into a wet land fit for growing paddy with the water from the Rāmēśvaram canal. The donor is said to have obtained Muliki-nāḍu as a nāyaṅkara from Narasā-nāyaka who is stated to have been ruling over the kingdom at the command of Sāḷuva Immaḍi Narasiṅgarāya-mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakaEvery line of the text begins with a cypher.
varuṣaṁbulu 1420 Agunēṭi kāḷayukti saṁvatsara mā¨rggasira
ba 30 gu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mēdinimīsaragaṁḍa kaṭhā
risāśuva sāḷuva yiṁmaḍi narasiṁgarāyamahārāyala
paṁpuna narasānāyaniṁgāru pṛthvirājyamu sēyaṁgānu
mulikināṭilōni rāmēśvaraṁ rāmayaliṁgamuku gaṁṭi kaṁ
namanāyaniṁgāru Icina dha(ṁ)¨rmmaśāsanaṁ narasāyaniṁgāru māku nā
yaṁkrānaku beṭina rāmēśvaraṁ podaṭūranu sa¨rva sū
¨ryyagrahaṇa puṁṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōśi yiccina kṣētraṁ niṁma
latōṁṭa paḍamara rāmēśvaraṁ polānaboṁdanu Iccina maḍilō
rēgaḍapramāṇaṁ gōca(ṁ)¨rmmaṁ kha 4 . Akṣarālā nāluguvuṭlu baṁ
duṁ varimaḍiṁni rāmayaliṁgamuku nityakrityamayina pagaliṁṭi
Avasaraṁ nayivēdyamunakuṁ cēyi stimi rāmēśvaraṁ kāluva nī
ḷḷanu maḍisēsukoni stānaṁvāru dēvaraku dappakuṁḍā Ava
sarakaṁḍa naḍapukoni Āceṁdrā¨rkkastāyigānu nidhinikṣēpajala
pāṣāṇaAkṣiṇiĀgāmisidhasādhyālu mōdalayina Aṣṭabhōgatē
jasvā(ṁ)myatalanu putrapautranauvṛtu pāraṁpa¨ryyānanu
naḍacuvāru . yiṁduku yevvaru dappinānu paṁca
mahāpātakāluṁ śēsina pāpāna bōvuvāru
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattā
paharēṇa svada ttaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . dānapālanayō
¨rmadhyē (.) dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānā(ḥ)tsva¨rga mavāpnōti
pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī . On the left hand corner of the above are engraved the following lines:—
śubhamastu rāma
pratiṣṭi śrīrā-
mayya liṁgamu
mahā
gaṁggagō
nu śrī
maṁtuṁḍunu na
śrīyutu
lamini
Digital edition of SII 16.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
